lines.speaker: Robyn
lines.text: Hello there! Is there anything I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Robyn
lines.text: Its a little slow... There's a lot of soldiers around these parts, so many people just wear a uniform.

lines.speaker: Robyn
lines.text: Although, I'm just happy to be here! Osten recently took me on as his assistant, you see. I've always wanted to work in fashion!

lines.speaker: Robyn
lines.text: Anyway, enough about me... Was there something I could help you with? Perhaps a new cape? ...Or a nice new chef's hat?

lines.speaker: Robyn
lines.text: I'll be right here if you need anything!
